title: stipagrostis pungens subsp. pubescens
intro: Stipagrostis pungens subsp. pubescens, also known as the hairy or pubescent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant are primarily used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Stipagrostis pungens subsp. pubescens include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
